query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quiz_answers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  submissionId INT NOT NULL,
  questionId INT NOT NULL,
  userAnswer TEXT NOT NULL,
  isCorrect TINYINT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS practice_tests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  totalQuestions INT NOT NULL,
  timeLimit INT NOT NULL,
  passingScore INT DEFAULT 70,
  isActive TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS practice_test_questions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  practiceTestId INT NOT NULL,
  questionId INT NOT NULL,
  questionOrder INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS practice_test_attempts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  practiceTestId INT NOT NULL,
  score INT NOT NULL,
  totalQuestions INT NOT NULL,
  passed TINYINT NOT NULL,
  timeSpent INT NOT NULL,
  attemptedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ged_certificates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  certificateNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  verificationCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  issuedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX certificateNumber (certificateNumber),
  INDEX verificationCode (verificationCode),
  INDEX userId (userId)
);
